title: The Race Against the Cage
description: Citizens, fighters, and the Straw Hat allies push back against the Birdcage as Luffy and Law continue the fight.
scene: On pages 4–10, Luffy, Doflamingo, King Riku, Trafalgar Law, Trebol move through the final crisis of Dressrosa as the Birdcage and Doflamingo’s rule reach their breaking point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Arch enemies! The final battle! Luffy vs. Dofla- Mino-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: All I was trying to do...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What! A clash of Haoshoku Haki!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That shot nosed punk has it too!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It is proof of one who has the qualities of a king! Dofla- Mingo...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: If yer' a man, it's time you tested yourself.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: shall I give him the power to exact revenge?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: There are too many to count!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Behehe! You'll never be a match for him!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Doffy is different... he's cut from a different cloth!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: His birth fostered his mad- Ness!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: They have made this man into a monolithic yaksha*!

summary: This part focuses on the race against the cage, keeping the final battle centered on Luffy, Law, Doflamingo, and the people trapped inside the Birdcage.
